text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Are you shopping for something
too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out buying some pastries, I spot Winning
Ticket and Yukino Bijin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uh huh! Me and Yuki are here to get some
'grammable pastries!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sorry, Tickezo's just accompanying me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When I told her about these pastries I wanna get,
she suggested we go together.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Cause if Yuki's interested in them, they've gotta
be good!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's find some photogenic pastries!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to go shopping together.
However, the further we go inside...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, this sure is a pastry hot spot... There're
so many folks around!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
The shop we want is... Oh no, it's way in the
back... What should we do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hnnghh... Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Hayahide said, "If you think
logically, nothing is impossible." So let's think
logically!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Logically? How do we do that?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uh... Um... Well!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ummm... Hnngh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's it—a strategy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But how? What do we do, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Studying the crowd, I can think of a few
methods...
choice_data_list: Let's try to slip through as quickly as we can.

Let's keep an eye on the flow of the crowd and
move with it.
Let's wait until the crowd clears out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There we go! Let's hurry and zoom right through
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We squeeze past wherever there's an opening,
but the dense crowd doesn't allow us to make
much progress.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I don't feel like we're gett'n through at all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yuki, Trainer, this way! Around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I found the shop! This is it, right?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hm... Yup, that's the one! I'll go buy some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket showed surprising speed making
her way through, so I ask how she did it...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, maybe because it's just like when I'm
running a race?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Like, during a race when I think, "Okay, time to
speed up!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No matter how packed the front is, I put all my
energy into that one push!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Winning Ticket has a good trick up her
sleeve to move forward in tight situations.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You got them? Woohoo! Pastries!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You betcha! ♪ It's all thanks to the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know, how 'bout after this, we eat 'em
togeth'r? I just have to repay you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Can we? Aww, Yuki, you're so... so kiiiind! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: There we go! We'll follow the flow and gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moving with the crowd, we proceed straight
ahead, then start curving, gradually losing sight
of our destination.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where was that shop again... This way? Or
over there?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You two, this way! Look, that's the shop's sign!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is! I'll go buy some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket was able to move through the
crowd without losing her sense of direction, so I
ask her how she did it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmm, maybe it's just like when I'm running a race?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
During a race, you kinda gotta decide for
yourself when the critical moment to move is.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's weird, but when it happens, I don't feel lost
anymore and can just shoot ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Winning Ticket has a good trick up her
sleeve to make the most of critical moments.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You got them? Woohoo! Pastries!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You betcha! ♪ It's all thanks to the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know, how 'bout after this, we eat 'em
togeth'r? I just have to repay you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Can we? Aww, Yuki, you're so... so kiiiind! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Got it! If we wait a while, there'll be less people,
and we'll be able to get there super easy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Say, Yuki, the ones you want are the 'grammable
pastries, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But, um, what does 'grammable mean?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Jordan says that all the time too, so I've always
wondered what it means... Like, pastries your
Gramma would like? Maybe?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I hardly know myself, but city girls use it when
someth'n looks peachy on the social media!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Peachy, huh? Ah, so when it looks nice in
pictures, it looks 'grammable? I see! Yuki, you're
so smart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While they chat, the crowd slowly begins to thin
out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's getting emptier! Maybe this is the right
time to go buy your pastries!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll go get some!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You got them? Woohoo! Pastries!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You betcha! ♪ It's all thanks to the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know, how 'bout after this, we eat 'em
togeth'r? I just have to repay you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Can we? Aww, Yuki, you're so... so kiiiind! Sob!
